candidates.why: Appears in the current liabilities section and best matches short-term debt/current borrowings; excludes lease rows.
Conceptually relevant, but no reported values and likely supplemental only.
Semantically relevant, but appears blank in preview while a populated current borrowings line exists.

variables.notes: R:c. Best semantic match is the current-section 'Loans and borrowings' row (118.0, 109.0, etc.), excluding lease liabilities. Manual review flagged because the same label also appears in non-current liabilities, and the schema cannot distinguish duplicate identical row labels on the same sheet.

candidates.why: Exact match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities.

candidates.why: Cash-flow reconciliation item, not a balance-sheet PPE stock.

variables.notes: Under IFRS this is the clearest total PPE-equivalent balance-sheet line.
